prereq_merge_sequence.fix: UX-01 frame_pacer landing on main so macOS-14 stability test stops flaking PR #512 CI
MSRV alignment (Rust 1.86 / Cargo.lock format) so the MSRV gate is reachable from PR #512
Timing / scheduler hardening prerequisite for the rebased PR #512 CI run
Pre-A3 macOS-14 hot-reload config-watcher canonicalised paths

actionlint.notes: Both workflows lint clean after CI-01 matrix expansion. Re-run command: `actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/contract-weekly.yml` (binary at $USERPROFILE/.copilot/bin/actionlint.exe).

workflow_dispatch_run.notes: PR #512 CI was triggered automatically by the post-rebase push of head 819416e onto wave-1/t0-batch. The earlier `gh workflow run` workflow_dispatch trigger from a sub-agent was never available (sub-agents are forbidden from `git push`); the rebased PR-triggered run is the equivalent evidence and supersedes the placeholder.

post_rebase_verified_jobs.name: MSRV (Rust 1.86) build
post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: Confirms PR #516 fix landed; the MSRV gate is reachable and green on the rebased PR #512 head.

post_rebase_verified_jobs.name: Cross-platform build (macos-14, default)
post_rebase_verified_jobs.note: macOS-14 build is green post-rebase (#515 + #518 fixes).

macos13_matrix_removed.reason: GitHub-hosted macos-13 runner pool kept the three macos-13 matrix permutations in `queued` for >19 hours on run 26360760221, indefinitely blocking PR #512. Removed from .github/workflows/ci.yml matrix; this is NOT a claim that macos-13 ever passed.

next_steps: Orchestrator (not this sub-agent) re-runs CI on the updated wave-1/t0-batch head and watches the new matrix (Windows + macos-14 + MSRV + VMIC + Linux gates).

When every required context in `CI-01-required-checks.md` §2.1–§2.3 (excluding the removed macos-13 permutations enumerated in §2.6) reaches `conclusion=success`, the orchestrator flips `status` here to `pass` and adds the final `triggered_at` / `triggered_by` fields.
Until then `status=in_progress_post_rebase` is the truthful state and MUST NOT be claimed as green readiness.
